visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with her hair in a bun and wearing a white long-sleeved dress sits in a white chair. She cradles a large pink quilted bag as if it were a child while drinking from a clear glass. A small white side table holds a bowl of oranges. The setting is a bright, minimalist indoor space with soft, even lighting. (2) The scene shifts to a tight close-up of the woman's face. She is making a crying expression, pointing to her skin. Her complexion appears oily with visible texture. (3) The woman holds a bottle of Kiehl's Clearly Corrective Daily Re-Texturizing Triple Acid Peel. She applies the liquid to her cheeks and forehead using the dropper and then rubs it in with her hands. (4) A vertical split-screen comparison shows her face 'Before' (with texture and dullness) and 'After' (with smoother, brighter skin). (5) She holds a large bottle of Kiehl's Calendula Herbal-Extract Toner. She applies soaked cotton pads to her cheeks and poses with a smile. (6) The video concludes with the woman standing behind a table covered with multiple Kiehl's product sets and promotional boxes, gesturing towards them enthusiastically.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我以為帶小孩的我. (2) [Subtitle]: 實際上帶小孩的我. [Variety]: 毛孔粗大. [Variety]: 粉刺問題. [Variety]: 油光. (3) [Subtitle]: 什麼 漂亮媽咪. (4) [Slogan]: Kiehl's 三酸溜溜瓶. (5) [Subtitle]: BEFORE. [Subtitle]: AFTER. [Variety]: 粗糙臉 變細嫩滑溜溜!. (6) [Variety]: 3天有感嫩滑!. [Variety]: 延續醫美效果!. (7) [Variety]: 淺、中、深層幫肌膚代謝. [Variety]: 水感質地超清爽!. (8) [Variety]: 夏天用超適合!. (9) [Variety]: 敏感肌可用. (10) [Slogan]: 大推這瓶 金盞花化妝水. (11) [Variety]: 輕鬆瓦解 曬紅曬傷危機. (12) [Variety]: 買一送一. [Logo]: momo.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair tied in a bun, wearing a white long-sleeved dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist white indoor environment with a chair, side table, and eventually a table filled with product displays and boxes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo synth-pop music begins immediately. A female voice speaks with high energy and a friendly tone, articulating clearly. (2) A 'ding' sound effect plays as a text overlay appears on screen. The vocal tone becomes more dramatic and slightly higher pitched as she acts out distress. (3) A 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition between product demonstrations. The music maintains a consistent, driving beat underneath the continuous narration. (4) Pop-style sound effects punctuate each new piece of promotional text appearing. The voice maintains a high level of excitement and authority while detailing product benefits. (5) The music swells slightly in volume during the final call to action, accompanied by a final bright 'stinger' sound effect as the video ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Comparison -> Problem Identification -> Product Solution -> Technical Explanation -> Special Promotion.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Kiehl's skincare products by demonstrating their effectiveness for busy mothers and highlighting a limited-time buy-one-get-one-free offer on the momo shopping platform.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on the Kiehl's brand, showcasing specific products, benefits, and current promotional prices.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a relatable 'busy mom' persona to create an emotional hook before transitioning into a high-density, sales-driven product review and promotional announcement.
